body.noscript: You need to enable JavaScript to run this app.

div.p:
The Maritime Safety Information (MSI) Portal is currently unavailable. Please take advantage of the helpful resources linked here.
MSI will be operational as quickly as possible. We appreciate your patience and understanding during this outage.

div.b:
Latest Navigational Warnings
NAVAREA IV
NAVAREA XII
HYDROLANT
HYDROPAC
HYDROARC

div.a: NORTH ATLANTIC OCEAN AND ADJACENT SEAS (PDF)
SOUTH ATLANTIC OCEAN AND INDIAN OCEAN (PDF)

div.div: Dynamic content classified up to UNCLASSIFIED
